heavy_slash.name: Heavy Slash
heavy_slash.desc: A sweeping heavy strike. Deals 1.6x weapon damage.

flame_strike.name: Flame Strike
flame_strike.desc: Ignites the blade. Deals 1.2x damage and inflicts Burn (8 dmg/tick for 3 ticks).

remedy_light.name: Healing Remedy
remedy_light.desc: Chants a minor healing spell, restoring 20 Health.

piercing_stab.name: Piercing Stab
piercing_stab.desc: Ignores Yokai defense entirely. Deals flat 1.1x attack damage.

whack.name: WHACK
whack.desc: spank spank spank spank spank spank
